item.title: Berkeley economists publish landmark study on AI labor-market effects
item.author: news@berkeley.edu (Greta Hartl)
item.description: The five-year longitudinal study tracks wage outcomes in industries with high AI exposure.

item.title: Statistics department welcomes Mei Lin as visiting professor
item.author: news@berkeley.edu (Greta Hartl)
item.description: Mei Lin joins the Statistics department for the 2024-2025 academic year.
